data.name: 遺跡探索者
data.detailed_description:
Quem, an adventurer, is the first person to step foot in the dungeon, "Heaven's Ladder", in over 500 years.

But not long after she does so, a strange shadowy monster casts some sort of curse on her.

"Come deep――into――this place――I shall await you at――the highest spot――", the apparition says before vanishing.

In order to break the curse, Quem teams up with the adventurer Vise to explore the dungeon and to uncover the meaning behind those mysterious words.

Features:

  • A Classic Style Action RPG

  • Explore an Ancient Dungeon

  • Switch Between Melee and Ranged Weapons

  • Subquest System

  • Weapon Enhancing System

  • Replay Cleared Dungeons
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: An adventurer named Quem is the first person to step foot inside "Heaven's Ladder" in 500 years. But not long after, she's cursed by a strange, shadowy monster. Now she must reach the top of Heaven's Ladder, and hopefully, break the spell.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Nupuryu no sato, All Rights Reserved.
